items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 40
items.note: For 'Down to the Last Breath' — defeat Clair in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 40 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: Swinub from the cave right before Blackthorn City is part Ice — Clair's worst nightmare, and a great pick for the rest of the game. Grab one, or two.
